summary: SUPPLIER RESPONSE DIFF FEATURE COMPLETE. Backend: 9/9 pytest tests passed. Frontend: All UI elements verified (4 KPI cards, recent_diffs table, simulation results with Fiyat Diff column). Simulation 10/10 PASS. Turkish language (TR) correctly used.
critical_code_review_comments: pilot_flow_validator.py: test_booking() correctly generates supplier_response_diff with initial_price, revalidation_price, diff_amount, diff_pct, drift_direction
pilot_flow_validator.py: get_pilot_metrics_dashboard() properly aggregates diff data into supplier_response_diff section with avg/max/min diff_pct, drift distribution, alert_count
pilot_flow_validator.py: run_batch_simulation() returns supplier_response_diff_summary with aggregate metrics
PilotOnboardingDashboardPage.jsx: 4 KPI cards (Ort. Fiyat Farki, Maks. Fiyat Farki, Drift Dagilimi, Diff Alarmlar) all present with correct data-testid attributes
PilotOnboardingDashboardPage.jsx: Son Fiyat Farklari table with all 6 columns (Supplier, Ilk Fiyat, Revalidation Fiyat, Fark TRY, Fark %, Yon)
MOCKED: All pilot flow tests use SIMULATION mode - no real supplier/accounting API integration
seed_data_creation: Simulation creates SimFlow-1 through SimFlow-10 agencies during each run
context_for_next_testing_agent: Supplier Response Diff feature fully tested and working. Key endpoints: POST /api/pilot/onboarding/run-simulation returns supplier_response_diff_summary with avg_diff_pct, max_diff_pct, min_diff_pct, avg_diff_amount, max_diff_amount, alert_count, total_checks. GET /api/pilot/onboarding/metrics returns supplier_response_diff section with drift distribution (up/down/stable counts) and recent_diffs array. Frontend at /app/admin/pilot-onboarding shows all 4 KPI cards in Turkish (Ort. Fiyat Farki, Maks. Fiyat Farki, Drift Dagilimi, Diff Alarmlar) plus recent_diffs table. Alert threshold is 5% - controlled in simulation mode (0-5% drift), sandbox/production uses 0-15%.

backend_apis.POST /api/pilot/onboarding/run-simulatio: PASS - Returns supplier_response_diff_summary with avg_diff_pct, max_diff_pct, min_diff_pct, avg_diff_amount, max_diff_amount, alert_count, total_checks
backend_apis.Each flow's supplier_response_diff: PASS - Contains initial_price, revalidation_price, diff_amount, diff_pct, drift_direction
backend_apis.GET /api/pilot/onboarding/metrics: PASS - Returns supplier_response_diff with avg_diff_pct, max_diff_pct, total_checks, drift_up/down/stable counts, alert_count, recent_diffs array
backend_apis.recent_diffs array structure: PASS - Each entry has initial_price, revalidation_price, diff_pct, diff_amount, supplier, drift_direction
backend_apis.Simulation 10/10 success rate: PASS - 100% success rate maintained in simulation mode
backend_apis.Alert threshold logic: PASS - diffs > 5% flagged as alerts, threshold properly returned
